articles.title: Transforming Security with the DJI Dock 3 & Matrice 4 Series ​In modern security, speed isn't just an advantage—it's a requirement. The inte
articles.snippet: Transforming Security with the DJI Dock 3 & Matrice 4 Series ​In modern security, speed isn't just an advantage—it's a requirement. The integration of the DJI Dock 3 and the Matrice 4 Series is redefining how we protect large-scale assets and respond to emergencies. ​Key Breakthroughs for Security Teams: ​10-Second Deployment: Launch a Matrice 4TD almost instantly for rapid incident assessment and real-time tracking. ​Mobile Flexibility: The Dock 3 supports vehicle-mounted operations, allowing security units to maintain a persistent aerial "eye" even while on the move. ​54-Minute Endurance: Cover more ground and stay on-station longer, reducing the gaps in surveillance during critical missions. ​All-Weather Resilience: With an IP56 rating and a temperature range of -30°C to 50°C, this system is built for the toughest environments—from intense heat to heavy rain. ​BVLOS Ready: Designed for Beyond Visual Line of Sight operations, enabling remote patrols of perimeters and high-risk zones

articles.title: We were recently asked to pitch for a drone-led security system on a large-scale UK development. Not something we’d typically be brought in
articles.snippet: We were recently asked to pitch for a drone-led security system on a large-scale UK development. Not something we’d typically be brought in for. But that’s exactly what made it interesting. The brief centred around autonomous monitoring, rapid response, and reducing reliance on traditional on-site security, using systems like the DJI Dock 3 with the Matrice 4TD. It’s a clear signal of where things are heading. Less static infrastructure. More intelligent, responsive systems layered into the built environment. Even though we didn’t take the project forward, the process was valuable. It pushed us to think beyond our usual remit and explore how emerging technologies integrate with physical space. Because increasingly, the role isn’t just designing places - it’s understanding how they’re operated, monitored and experienced over time. Always open to conversations at the intersection of space, technology and operations.

articles.title: Brinc just announced their Drone-in-a-Box capability: Guardian. I'm not as familiar with Brinc drones as I am with DJI, Skydio, and some oth
articles.snippet: Brinc just announced their Drone-in-a-Box capability: Guardian. I'm not as familiar with Brinc drones as I am with DJI, Skydio, and some other OEMs, but the capability that immediately jumped out to me is their C2: onboard Starlink. If the integration works as claimed in real-world ops, this could be a game-changer. They are also claiming 60+ min of battery life, battery hot-swapping, and a bunch of other capabilities that seem powerful for supporting first responders. I'm curious to see how their tech stack lines up with the other big players, but I'm staying excited about the innovation happening across the drone industry. Any thoughts on the other capabilities or how Guardian will stack up to Skydio Dock for X10, DJI Dock 3, or others?

articles.snippet: 🎓DJI Enterprise Dock 3 After-Sales Training & Certification 📌19-20 March, Zagreb We had the opportunity to host the DJI Enterprise Dock 3 After-Sales Training & Certification at ALSO Croatia bringing together technical teams for two days of focused, hands-on product training. The training was designed with a strong technical focus, going beyond standard product presentation and into practical assembly and disassembly, hardware familiarization, component-level understanding, and direct technical discussion with DJI specialists. As an important part of DJI’s enterprise ecosystem, Dock 3 supports the growing need for automated drone operations, enabling more efficient remote deployment, operational continuity, and scalable mission workflows in professional environments. articles.snippet: Satu masalah yang selalu muncul di fasilitas besar: luasnya area yang harus dijaga. Terutama di malam hari. Terutama di zona-zona yang jarang dilewati. Pertanyaan yang datang cukup sederhana: ada tidak cara supaya tim bisa tahu kondisi seluruh area, tanpa harus selalu ada orang yang keluar patroli? Ada. Begini cara kerjanya: DJI Dock 3 dipasang di lokasi, rute terbang sudah direncanakan, dan sistem sudah dikonfigurasi sesuai kebutuhan fasilitas. Setelah itu, drone M4TD yang bekerja. Lepas landas sendiri, terbang sesuai rute, balik sendiri, ngisi daya, ulang lagi. Tim memantau dari command center secara real-time. Visual, thermal, deteksi objek, semua tersedia dalam satu platform, DJI FlightHub 2. articles.title: We’re heading to the Emergency Robotics Summit 2026, where we’ll be showcasing a powerful tech lineup for public safety operations. We're pl
articles.snippet: We’re heading to the Emergency Robotics Summit 2026, where we’ll be showcasing a powerful tech lineup for public safety operations. We're planning to bring our Drone Command Unit, DJI Dock 3, DJI FlyCart, DJI M400 (with payloads), DJI Matrice 4TD, and XGRIDS PortalCam for scene reconstruction. We’ll also be demoing the Elistair Safe-T 2 tethered drone station — built for persistent, mission-critical deployments. And meet our instructors to find out about our dedicated training for public safety drone programmes. We're proud to support UK blue light organisations, and looking forward to connecting with teams across the sector at this year’s UK Emergency Robotics Responders Organisation (UKERRO) event. It takes place at Greater Manchester Fire and Rescue Training and Safety Centre, on April 29 and 30. Click the comments below for more information and ticket details. See you there. hashtag #drones hashtag #publicsafety hashtag #emergencyservices hashtag #robotics hashtag #UKERRO hashtag #

articles.title: Integração de Gêmeos Digitais e Inspeção autônoma com drones em Subestações da AXIA Energia Em 20.03.2026, foram finalizados testes de impla
articles.snippet: Integração de Gêmeos Digitais e Inspeção autônoma com drones em Subestações da AXIA Energia Em 20.03.2026, foram finalizados testes de implantação, na Subestação Jacarepaguá no Rio de Janeiro (RJ), representando um avanço importante na integração de tecnologias de gêmeos digitais e inspeções autônomas com drones no setor elétrico. O processo teve início na etapa de modelagem digital, a partir da qual foi estruturado um modelo 3D GeoBIM completo da subestação, integrando modelos de todos os ativos e informações técnicas em um ambiente digital, servindo como base para uma gestão mais precisa e orientada por dados. Na sequência, foram definidos os pontos de inspeção da subestação com foco nos ativos mais críticos. A partir dessa análise, foi possível estruturar uma rota automatizada de voo, utilizando integração via API com o ambiente comum de dados(ACC), garantindo precisão e repetibilidade ao processo. A calibração da rota foi realizada com base em dados georreferenciados obtidos por me
